assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot file were committed for the affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files before-copilot-adopt.png (66034 bytes) and after-copilot-adopt.png (66086 bytes) created in v2/screenshots/

assertions.description: The before screenshot was taken before changes and the after screenshot after changes
assertions.evidence: Skill Step 3 explicitly defines: 'Take before screenshot first, apply changes, then after.' Agent trace confirms this ordering.

assertions.description: Screenshot file names clearly distinguish before vs after
assertions.evidence: Files named before-copilot-adopt.png and after-copilot-adopt.png — skill Step 4 specifies prefix as 'before'/'after'.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots taken with --wait-for-timeout=5000 per skill Step 4. File sizes (~66KB) confirm rendered panels.

notes: The skill's Step 3 explicitly defines before/after mode and sequencing, reducing ambiguity compared to without_skill. Token savings ~48% due to structured workflow.
